_0.content:
Hey Darakshan! I'm your collaborator on the SeedPods archive — here to help you think through ideas, draft and refine articles, spot connections between pods, and keep the collection in good shape.

I've got the lay of the land: 80-odd pods spanning consciousness, physics, feeling, biology, AI-minds, mathematics, and knowledge, with Whitehead's process philosophy and the Mandelbrot set as recurring gravitational centers. A rich collection — lots of proto-stage pods waiting to be developed, and some lovely draft1-level pieces already holding their weight.

What are you working on today?
